title: Authors and Citation
text: Kenny C (2025). ppmf: ppmf: Read Census Privacy Protected Microdata Files. R package, https://christophertkenny.com/ppmf/.
code: @Manual{ppmf,   title = {{ppmf}: ppmf: Read Census Privacy Protected Microdata Files},   author = {Christopher T. Kenny},   year = {2025},   note = {R package},   url = {https://christophertkenny.com/ppmf/}, }

what: Read Census Privacy Protected Microdata Files
title: Read Census Privacy Protected Microdata Files
text: goal ppmf convert Census Privacy Protected Microdata Files somewhat wider data aggregated geographic level.

title: Read Census Privacy Protected Microdata Files
text: install stable version CRAN, use following code: can install development version GitHub :

title: Read Census Privacy Protected Microdata Files
text: Load package: Download read data : Version ‘19’ reflects 19.61 finalized parameters used 2020 Census. future use, recommend storing path data future sessions using: path can recovered : ’ve read want, can aggregate right level: aggregated data can use GEOID merge shapefiles: users newest package version, added dependency censable, allows easier workflow. ’ve used add_pmmf*_path() workflow suggested, don’t even need supply paths! just read ppmf data, merge 2010 Census populations (major race/ethnicity grouping) add corresponding geometries.
code: library(ppmf) path <- download_ppmf(dsn = 'filename.csv', dir = 'some/directory', version = '19') al <- read_ppmf(state = 'AL', path = path) add_pmmf19_path(path) path19 <- Sys.getenv('ppmf19') al <- al |> add_geoid() blocks <- agg(al) library(dplyr) # to clean up the data  shp <- tigris::blocks('AL', year = 2010) |>    select(GEOID10, geometry) |> rename(GEOID = GEOID10) shp <- shp |> left_join(blocks, by = 'GEOID')  # always clean shp! shp[is.na(shp)] <- 0 al <- read_merge_ppmf('AL', level = 'block', versions = '19')

what: Add Standard GEOID to PPMF Data — add_geoid
title: Add Standard GEOID to PPMF Data — add_geoid
text: Adds GEOID identifier common spatial census data sets, loaded tigris. allows easier merging aggregation single variable.

title: Add Standard GEOID to PPMF Data — add_geoid
code: add_geoid(   ppmf,   state = TABBLKST,   county = TABBLKCOU,   tract = TABTRACT,   block_group = TABBLKGRP,   block = TABBLK,   level = "block" )

title: Add Standard GEOID to PPMF Data — add_geoid
text: ppmf tibble ppmf data state Column ppmf state (fips) ID. Default TABBLKST. county Column ppmf county (fips) ID. Default TABBLKCOU. tract Column ppmf tract ID. Default TABBLKTRACT. block_group Column ppmf block group ID. Default TABBLKGRP block Column ppmf block ID. Default TABBLK. level Geographic level write GEOID . Options block (default), block_group, tract, county.

title: Add Standard GEOID to PPMF Data — add_geoid
text: input data ppmf added column GEOID

title: Add Standard GEOID to PPMF Data — add_geoid

title: Aggregate PPMF Data — agg
text: Aggregate PPMF Data

title: Aggregate PPMF Data — agg
code: agg(ppmf, group = GEOID, age = VOTING_AGE, race = CENRACE, hisp = CENHISP)

title: Aggregate PPMF Data — agg
text: ppmf tibble ppmf data group Column ppmf group , typically GEOID age Column ppmf containing 1 voting age 2 voting age race Column ppmf containing race codes hisp Column ppmf containing 1 Hispanic 2 Hispanic

title: Aggregate PPMF Data — agg
text: tibble ppmf data aggregated group race classified columns: group: named entry group pop: total population pop_hisp: total population - Hispanic Latino (race) pop_white: total population - White alone, Hispanic Latino pop_black: total population - Black African American alone, Hispanic Latino pop_aian: total population - American Indian Alaska Native alone, Hispanic Latino pop_asian: total population - Asian alone, Hispanic Latino pop_nhpi: total population - Native Hawaiian Pacific Islander alone, Hispanic Latino pop_other: total population - Race alone, Hispanic Latino pop_two: total population - Population two races, Hispanic Latino vap: voting age population vap_hisp: voting age population - Hispanic Latino (race) vap_white: voting age population - White alone, Hispanic Latino vap_black: voting age population - Black African American alone, Hispanic Latino vap_aian: voting age population - American Indian Alaska Native alone, Hispanic Latino vap_asian: voting age population - Asian alone, Hispanic Latino vap_nhpi: voting age population - Native Hawaiian Pacific Islander alone, Hispanic Latino vap_other: voting age population - Race alone, Hispanic Latino vap_two: voting age population - Population two races, Hispanic Latino

title: Aggregate PPMF Data — agg
code: data(ppmf_ex) ppmf_ex <- ppmf_ex |> add_geoid() blocks <- agg(ppmf_ex)

title: Breakdown GEOID into Components — breakdown_geoid
text: Breakdown GEOID Components

title: Breakdown GEOID into Components — breakdown_geoid
text: ppmf tibble ppmf data GEOID Column ppmf GEOID. Default GEOID.

title: Breakdown GEOID into Components — breakdown_geoid
text: tibble. ppmf columns added state, county, tract, block group, /block

title: Breakdown GEOID into Components — breakdown_geoid
code: data(ppmf_ex) ppmf_ex <- ppmf_ex |> add_geoid() ppmf_ex <- ppmf_ex |> censable::breakdown_geoid()

title: Download PPMF Files — download_ppmf
text: Downloads zipped ppmf files GitHub.

title: Download PPMF Files — download_ppmf
text: dsn (data save name) string unzip data dir folder directory save file version string '19r', '19', '12' '4' signifying revised 19.61, original 19.61, 12.2 4.5 versions respectively overwrite file found path/dsn, overwritten? Defaults FALSE.

title: Download PPMF Files — download_ppmf
text: string path file downloaded

title: Download PPMF Files — download_ppmf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Takes a few minutes and requires read access to files temp <- tempdir() path <- download_ppmf(dsn = 'ppmf_12', dir = temp) } # }

title: Get PPMF File Links — get_ppmf_links
text: Returns urls data. expanded link prior new releases.

title: Get PPMF File Links — get_ppmf_links
text: version string '19r',, '19', '12' '4' signifying 19.61, 12.2, 4.5 versions respectively compressed boolean. Return compressed version (TRUE). FALSE gives Census Bureau link uncompressed data.

title: Get PPMF File Links — get_ppmf_links
text: string url

title: Example PPMF Data — ppmf_ex
text: Includes Perry County, Alabama PPMF data April 28, 2021 PPMF data release. subset taken 12-2 P data. observation person, cover every block county due DAS, every block population appears data.

title: Example PPMF Data — ppmf_ex
text: tibble sample ppmf data

title: Race Classifications — races
text: data includes basic race classifications used redistricting get easier work set values. include hisp grouping controlled separately race within census

title: Race Classifications — races
text: tibble three columns code: two digit code used code races desc: description races group: summary group used

what: Read PPMF data and Merge with Census 2010 Data — read_merge_ppmf
title: Read PPMF data and Merge with Census 2010 Data — read_merge_ppmf
text: Read PPMF data Merge Census 2010 Data

title: Read PPMF data and Merge with Census 2010 Data — read_merge_ppmf
code: read_merge_ppmf(   state,   level,   versions = c("19"),   prefixes = paste0("v", versions, "_"),   paths = Sys.getenv(paste0("ppmf", versions)) )

title: Read PPMF data and Merge with Census 2010 Data — read_merge_ppmf
text: state state abbreviation level geography level. One 'block', 'block group', 'tract', 'county' versions character vector ppmf versions. Currently '19', '12', /'4' prefixes prefixes give pop vap columns output. Default paste0('v', versions, '_') paths paths PPMF data. Default Sys.getenv(paste0('ppmf', versions))

title: Read PPMF data and Merge with Census 2010 Data — read_merge_ppmf
text: sf tibble PPMF merged Census 2010 data

title: Read PPMF data and Merge with Census 2010 Data — read_merge_ppmf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Requires Census Bureau API de_bg <- read_merge_ppmf('DE', 'block group') } # }

title: Read in PPMF Data — read_ppmf
text: reads PPMF data file. Use download_ppmf() local copy ppmf data.

title: Read in PPMF Data — read_ppmf
text: state two letter state (+ DC + PR) abbreviation two digit state fips code path data saved ... additional arguments passed readr::read_csv()

title: Read in PPMF Data — read_ppmf
text: tibble ppmf data

title: Read in PPMF Data — read_ppmf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Takes a few minutes and requires read access to files temp <- tempdir() path <- download_ppmf('ppmf_12.csv', dir = temp) # If you already have it downloaded, point to it with path: ppmf <- read_ppmf('AL', path) } # }

title: Replace Race Categories — replace_race
text: Replaces Census's numeric categories race less specific racial classifications, typically useful redistricting purposes.

title: Replace Race Categories — replace_race
text: ppmf tibble ppmf data race Column ppmf containing race codes

title: Replace Race Categories — replace_race
text: tibble race column replaced simpler racial classifications

title: State Rows — states
text: data includes 52 geographies (50 states plus D.C. P.R.). Within 2010 PPMF, skip n_max indicate relevant rows geography.

title: State Rows — states
text: tibble sample ppmf data
